summary: Iter-88 verification of (1) ADMIN UPSTREAM-PROFILE DIGEST and (2) TEXT->PLANE extension of Photo-to-Plane dialog. Backend pytest 17/17 PASS. Frontend admin digest button + text-to-plane flow both work end-to-end with ZERO console errors.

issues: The 'Auto theme is on' info banner (top-right) sits on top of the tab strip and intercepts pointer events even though it does not visually overlap. Tab clicks (e.g. Orca sync) do not fire React onClick until the banner's 'Got it' button is dismissed. Playwright force=True click still failed; only programmatic .click() worked. Recommend either (a) reducing the banner's z-index or pointer-events:auto bounds to its visual rect, or (b) auto-dismissing on first tab change.

action_items: (Non-blocking) Investigate 'Got it' theme banner pointer-event interception on /admin — it blocks tab clicks despite not visually overlapping the tab strip.
critical_code_review_comments: OrcaUpstreamTab digest block: 'Last digest: 3m ago' refreshes via relTime; after click toast/state polling depends on the request completing (digest send-now can take 30s+ in real-Resend mode). The button correctly enters a 'SENDING…' disabled state during the request, which is good UX feedback.

PhotoToPlaneDialog: clean source-mode toggle, font dropdown is a native <select> (not shadcn) — keeps it accessible. Text preview re-renders on every keystroke; consider a 100-200ms debounce for very long strings to avoid jank on slow CPUs.
heightmap.js textToCanvas: works as expected — uses real canvas 2D context, so jsdom (unit-test) would throw but Playwright/real browsers handle fine (as noted in agent-to-agent context).
store.js still > 1300 lines per iter-87 review — slicing recommendation still stands but is not blocking iter-88.
test_credentials: MongoDB-seeded admin session per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. session_token=st_test_iter88_1780531609330 (user_id=user_test_iter88_1780531609330, is_admin=true). Cleaned up post-run.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 admin user + 1 user_session row into mongo test_database for Playwright cookie auth; deleted at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
BACKEND: /app/backend/tests/test_orca_upstream.py runs in ~42s, 17/17 PASS. The four new iter-88 tests (test_digest_state_endpoint_admin_only/_unauth/_returns_state, test_digest_send_now_returns_counts, test_digest_send_now_admin_only) all pass against the live preview backend. The send-now route returns 200 with a counts dict (the test accepts either {sent,failed,new,changed} or {sent,skipped:'no-changes'|'no-admins'} shape).

FRONTEND ADMIN: AdminPage tab testids are admin-tab-<key> (e.g. admin-tab-orca-upstream). IMPORTANT: the 'Got it' auto-theme info banner overlays the tab strip on first load and intercepts pointer events even with force=True; dismiss it first (button:has-text('Got it')) OR use page.evaluate('() => document.querySelector(testid).click()') to bypass. Once on the Orca tab, upstream-digest-block / upstream-digest-last / upstream-digest-send-btn are all present in the header row next to the existing Sync Now button. Clicking the send button transitions it to 'SENDING…' disabled state and fires a sonner toast on completion (we observed digest-last='3m ago' from prior tests' send-now calls — that's the existing prior-state, not a regression).

FRONTEND PHOTO-TO-PLANE TEXT MODE: window.__forgeStore exposes the Zustand store. Open via LeftPanel AI tab → photo-to-plane-btn. New testids: photo-to-plane-mode-photo / photo-to-plane-mode-text, photo-to-plane-text-controls, photo-to-plane-text-input (prefilled 'ForgeSlicer'), photo-to-plane-font (native <select>, use select_option). photo-to-plane-preview-canvas is 420x180. Editing the text or font re-renders the preview within ~200ms. photo-to-plane-generate-btn produces a heightmap mesh named '<text> (heightmap)'; verified with 'HELLO' → 12796 triangles, 80×26×3.6 mm, sonner toast 'Added "HELLO" — 12796 triangles, 80×26×3.6 mm.' and objects.length went 0→1. Dialog auto-closes after generate. Photo-mode dropzone reappears when switching back to photo-to-plane-mode-photo (verified mode-photo testid present at dialog open).

NO console errors observed in any flow.
